title: Mbese, mu mutima wawe, Ntufitiye Yes' ahw aba ?

lines: Mbese, mu mutima wawe, Ntufitiye Yes' ahw aba ?
Uh' Umwami Yes' ahw aba : Umvir' Ijwi rye ryinginga ' Kingur' umutima wawe,
Dor' imirimo n'iby'isi Bikwihariy' umutima : Ntagufitemw ahw atura,Nubwo
Mbes' uracyabuz' uburyo Bwo kwita kur' iryo jwi rye ? we gutind' uyu n'umunsi
Uhe Yes' ahw aba none, Kukw imins' ihita vuba, Udatungurwa n'urupfu, Rya jwi
